name.description: Workspace display name used in UI, PR annotations, and branch templates
Repo identifier referenced in depends_on lists

path.description: Relative path from workspace root to the repo directory

role.description: Freeform label injected into master planner prompt for context

depends_on.description: Repo names that must complete before this repo starts

command.description: Shell command for cross-repo integration tests

working_dir.description: Working directory relative to workspace root

umbrella_repo.description: GitHub org/repo for the umbrella issue linking all workspace PRs
